title: Reiwa no Dara-san
synopsis: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... Two young siblings wander into a dark world where they do not belong, and a long, horrid shadow rears up to meet them- Anyway, so that's how we met Dara-san! She might look kinda scary, but just wait until you get to know her! "Look, I'm a god of misfortune, okay!? Aren't you kids gonna freak out about my grotesque visage!?" (Source: Yen Press)

title: Sword for Truth
titleNative: 修羅之介斬魔劍 死鎌紋の男
synopsis: Shurannosuke Sakaki is a masterless samurai with a razor-sharp katana and a cold-hearted personality. Whenever you see the mark of two crossed scythes on his back, death is sure to follow. Because of his exceptional swordsmanship, Shurannosuke is hired by the Nakura Clan to rescue Princess Mayu from the Seki Ninja. In this mission, he must use his full potential to survive the Seki Ninja's notorious henchmen. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Itou Junji: Crimson
synopsis: Crimson refers to the color crimson or bright red, and the concept of this volume is "monsters." This is a collection of horror stories that carefully selects masterpieces filled with unique madness, allowing you to immerse yourself in the eerie, bizarre, and yet original world of Junji Ito. (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: The Buried Tree Devil
synonyms: The Grave Robbers: Qinling Sacred Tree
synopsis: After returning to Hangzhou from his past two adventures in Nansha, Wu Xie suddenly receives a call from his long-lost childhood friend Lao Yang. He talks to Wu Xie about their adventure in the hinterlands of Qinling Mountain three years ago and invites Wu Xie to explore the ancient ruins there again. During their adventure, Wu Xie and Lao Yang witness a giant taimen, a grand underground waterfall, and an unfathomable ancient sacred tree. Meanwhile Zhang Qiling, who has been elusive from the start, is secretly helping Wu Xie. (Source: Tencent Animation Youtube Channel, edited)

title: K.O. Beast
titleNative: KO世紀 ビースト三獣士
synopsis: Who cares about saving the world when there's treasure to be found! When Wan and his voracious appetite hook up with bossy little Mei-Mer and playboy Bud Mint, they won't let anything stand in their way to find all that glitters! Kidnapped by their mortal enemies, the Humans, our compatriots just happen to stumble upon the Humans' secret password-Dr. Password that is. In exchange for freeing his granddaughter Yuni, Password hands the greedy little gang the key to the greatest treasure the world has ever known! Of course they have no idea what it is or where it is, but they're not about to let the Humans get their grubby hands on it first! Now if they can only manage not to kill each other before they can find it... (Source: RightStuf)

title: Kyoshin to Hyouka no Shiro
synopsis: The story is set in Nagasaki prefecture in Minami Shimabara city, the fabled origin of the Shimabara Rebellion that sent shockwaves through all of Japan in the early Edo period. It is also where a third-year junior high school student named Shirou spends his days with his school friends. One summer day, Shirou's older childhood friend Akane returns to Minami Shimabara from Tokyo. Shirou and Akane take a stroll around Minami Shimabara with another longtime friend, Tokiya. While these friends are dealing with nostalgia and more complex feelings, a mysterious creature named Goron suddenly appears before them. This encounter with a mere little creature causes great events to unfold once more in this city... (Source: Anime News Network)

titleEnglish: Araiso Private High School Student Council Executive Committee
titleNative: 私立荒磯高等学校生徒会執行部
synopsis: Kubota Makoto and Tokitoh Minoru (characters from Kazuya Minekura's manga Wild Adaptor -- though no reference is made to the darker storyline of WA in this light-hearted anime) are the muscle of their high school's all-powerful student council. They defend the student body from disorder -- generated by both humans and demons -- while avoiding their classes. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: 博多明太！ぴりからこちゃん
synopsis: Hakata Mentai! Pirikarako-chan is set in a mysterious shopping center in a town that is like but also not quite like Hakata. In this setting, a walleye pollack roe fairy named Pirikarako-chan rushes about every day trying to ease the worries and solve the rumors of the other food fairies. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Makariudo: Demon Hunter
synonyms: 魔狩人 デーモンハンター
synopsis: Forgiven of her crime of looking into the past life of the one she loved, Yama Rikudou is a powerful being from the underworld sent to the human realm to hunt demons. She must eliminate the overflowing evil here in order to provide some balance to this world. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Ryokunohara Labyrinth: Sparkling Phantom
synopsis: Hiroki and Kanata have been together since they were children. One day Hiroki is caught up in an accident while trying to save a little girl. The next thing he knows, he is looking down on his own body. Separated from his body, Kanata, and everything else, he tries to figure out just what is going on. Why is he outside his body which is living on as if nothing has changed, how can he convince Kanata that he is there, and who is the strange girl, Fhalei, who keeps appearing for him?

title: Youkai Watch: Shadow Side
titleNative: 妖怪ウォッチ シャドウサイド
synopsis: Keisuke is a fifth grader who does not believe in ghosts, UFOs, or even youkai. Lately, he has noticed that Natsume has been coming home late, and one day decides to tail her. When he discovers that Natsume goes to a youkai detective agency, Natsume is forced to involve Keisuke in her activities. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: COSMO POLICE Justy
synopsis: In the future humanity is spread throughout the galaxy. In their efforts to combat criminal espers the Cosmo Police are fortunate to have Justy on their side. However the esper criminals also know this and some of them are making plans for Cosmo Policeman Justy. As their leader says "There's only one way to kill the most powerful esper in the galaxy". (Source: AniDB)
